recent.task: Campaign pulse posted — 9 Outreach Active, 0 replies at Day 1-2, Email 2 window opens tomorrow for painters

Rebuilt Brain tab: vault-native graph (36 nodes, 84 wikilink edges, 7 communities). Dropped graphify semantic extraction. Orphans removed. Every node = real vault file, every edge = [[wikilink]]. Hubs sized by inbound refs.

Built unified Command Centre dashboard: pipeline (Airtable live), operations (cron health), knowledge (decisions + sales brain). NFS design system. 2-hourly cron refresh (script-only, zero LLM tokens).

Backfilled 10 missing Messages records for calibration campaign. All sent dates reconciled with Prospects table. Cinderellas bounce confirmed (marked Lost). CRM audit trail now complete.
